consistency.internal: Consistent. The description clearly outlines the mechanics of enhanced vision in low light and darkness.
consistency.external: Consistent with standard fantasy/TTRPG mechanics for a 'Darkvision' trait.

quality.clarity: High. The numerical ranges (60 feet) and conditions (dim light, darkness) are clearly defined.
quality.completeness: Complete. It covers what the ability does, the range, and the limitation (cannot discern color).

limitations: Cannot discern color in darkness (only shades of gray).

llm_audit.archivist_notes: The trait is well-defined and mechanically sound, adhering to established conventions for describing sensory advantages in roleplaying contexts. No anomalies detected.
